raw_text:
WARNING [TC-I-001] interface.f90:2 <-> header.h:2
  CHAR_NUL_TERMINATION: Fortran CHARACTER(kind=c_char) array does not
  guarantee NUL termination. C caller using '%s' or strlen() will read
  past the end of valid data until a NUL byte is found elsewhere in memory.
  Fortran strings are blank-padded, not NUL-terminated.

NOTE: Append C_NULL_CHAR to buffer in Fortran, or document that C caller
      must use the maxlen parameter as a bounded length.
